channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Late-night host Stephen Colbert isn’t backing down from public dispute with CBS bosses
item.description: Colbert said that he was surprised by a network statement that denied Colbert had been told he couldn’t air an interview with a Texas Senate candidate for fear of triggering a little-known “equal time” rule by the FCC.

item.title: Crews search for 9 skiers missing after California avalanche near Lake Tahoe
How Democrats are feeling about their party, according to a new AP-NORC poll
